detaileddescription.para: This page provides detailed documentation for the lepton classes used in the ssml_mc20 event.

sect1.title: Muon
sect1.para: The muon class represents a reconstructed muon.

listitem.para: muon(): Initializes the particle type to "mu" and defines the data leaves to be read from the input tree. It also sets up a getter for the from_res attribute.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the muon particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the muon particle's properties from the input data.
void get_from_res(bool* val, muon* el): A static method that determines if the muon originates from a resonant top quark by checking its parent particles.
top_index: The index of the associated truth top quark.
from_res: A boolean flag indicating if the muon originates from a resonance.

sect1.title: Electron
sect1.para: The electron class represents a reconstructed electron.

listitem.para: electron(): Initializes the particle type to "el" and defines the data leaves. It also sets up a getter for the from_res attribute.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the electron particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the electron particle's properties from the input data.
void get_from_res(bool* val, electron* el): A static method that determines if the electron originates from a resonant top quark by checking its parent particles.
top_index: The index of the associated truth top quark.
pass_ecids: A boolean flag indicating if the electron passes the ECIDS criteria.
from_res: A boolean flag indicating if the electron originates from a resonance.

sect1.title: Lepton
sect1.para: The lepton class is a generic lepton class.

listitem.para: lepton(): Initializes the particle type to "lepton" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the lepton particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the lepton particle's properties from the input data.
ambiguity: The ambiguity flag for the lepton.
